messages.content: Paraphrase this sentence (•	57/40F survivors received food support. It was helpful to reduce family economic burden for the family. It was also an opportunity for client and their family to save income for education of children and also a part of small business operation.)

Food support was given to 57 out of 40F survivors, which helped alleviate the financial strain on their families. Additionally, this assistance provided an opportunity for clients and their families to save money for their children's education and contribute towards their small business endeavors.
Paraphrase this sentence (2/1F survivors got accidents and they received health treatment already. They got well after treatment.)
Two out of one female survivor experienced accidents and they have already undergone medical treatment. They have fully recovered after receiving treatment.

Paraphrase this sentences (•	1/1F survivor received small business support as laundry small shop services with contribute from commune councils (CCs) and they are sharing this support to district governor during CCWC Monthly meeting. )

The sole female survivor received support for her small laundry shop services, which was provided by the commune councils. During the monthly meeting of the commune council's women's committee (CCWC), she shared the details of this support with the district governor.

Paraphrase this sentences (•	1 female survivor received support for her small laundry shop services, which was provided by Hagar and the commune councils (CCs). During the monthly meeting of the commune council’s women’s committee (CCWC), this information was informed to district governor. )

Hagar, along with the commune councils (CCs), provided support for the small laundry shop services of one female survivor. This information was then communicated to the district governor during the monthly meeting of the commune council's women's committee (CCWC).

Paraphrase this sentences (During this reporting period, October 2023 (3rd month of year 3), the project has admitted and supported 11/7F Survivors (3/3F sexual abuses/rape, 8/4F trafficking and Exploitation). The services they received include health check-up and health care, counselling, case management, monthly food supports, and skill training/on-the-job training.)

In October 2023, which marks the third month of year three, the project has provided assistance to and admitted 11 out of 7 female survivors. Among these survivors, 3 out of 3 experienced sexual abuses or rape, while 8 out of 4 were subjected to trafficking and exploitation. The support they received encompassed health check-ups, healthcare services, counseling, case management, monthly food provisions, as well as skill training or on-the-job training.

Paraphrase this sentences (Client’s family that get the small business of laundry small shop services said; “Before knowing Hagar, I was a hopeless person. I forgot how to smile besides showing sad face... Later on, after Hagar came into my life, I started loving myself, I smiles, and I decreased my worries of income generation….I started know how to work with my family and community, now my family condition is getting better… Thanks Hagar that I always visit and supported us…!”)

The family of the client, who operates a small laundry shop, expressed their gratitude by saying, "Before becoming acquainted with Hagar, I felt hopeless and lost. I had forgotten how to smile, and could only wear a sad expression. However, after Hagar entered my life, I began to love myself again, and my smiles returned. My worries about generating income diminished, and I also learned how to collaborate with my family and community. Now, our family situation is steadily improving. I am forever grateful to Hagar for their continuous visits and support!"

Paraphrase this sentences (Client’s family that get the small business of laundry small shop services said; “Before knowing Hagar, I was a hopeless person. I forgot how to smile besides showing sad face… Later on, after Hagar came into my life, I started loving myself, I smiles, and I decreased my worries of income generation….I started know how to work with my family and community, now my family condition is getting better… Thanks Hagar that I always visit and supported us…!”)

The family of the client, who operates a small laundry shop, shared their sentiments stating that prior to their association with Hagar, they had lost hope and their smiles had faded, leaving only sadness. However, after Hagar entered their lives, they found self-love, regained their smiles, and experienced a reduction in worries about generating income. They also learned how to collaborate with their family and community, resulting in an improvement in their family's overall condition. The family expressed their sincere gratitude towards Hagar for their constant visitation and support.

Paraphrase this quote(“I am very happy that Hagar come to work and help our people, now Communities have gained more knowledge on Child Right, Child Protection, Child Abuse, Human Trafficking and Safe Migration and they will be able to protect themselves and their children in communities, I do with hope that these activities can do long time…Thanks”. Robos Mongkol Commune chief said during our staff bring foods support to client’s families and monitor of small business;

"I am immensely grateful for the presence and efforts of Hagar in our community. With their assistance, our communities have gained valuable knowledge on vital topics such as child rights, child protection, child abuse, human trafficking, and safe migration. This empowerment equips them to safeguard themselves and their children within the community. Looking ahead, I sincerely hope that these activities can continue for an extended duration. Thank you." These were the words expressed by Robos Mongkol Commune chief during our staff's visit, where we provided food support to clients' families and monitored the progress of their small businesses.

Paraphrase this sentences (The Project staff always working closely with sub-national level from Provincial to District, commune and village level under the facilitation from Social affair Department and Provincial Office to support our project activities. In addition, on Oct our project team worked with three Deputy District Governors at Moung Russey, Ou Chruv, and SreySnom districts with capacity Training on Psychological first aid to all CCWCs. )

The project staff maintains close collaboration with various levels of sub-national administration, ranging from provincial to district, commune, and village levels. This collaborative effort is facilitated by the Social Affairs Department and Provincial Office to ensure the smooth implementation of our project activities. Additionally, in October, our project team conducted capacity training on Psychological First Aid for all Commune Councils for Women and Children (CCWCs) in collaboration with three Deputy District Governors from Moung Russey, Ou Chruv, and SreySnom districts.

Paraphrase this sentences (During the project report period the project staff working clients’ families that they got small business support request to get the training on animal raising also planned with Community education awareness on GBV, HT, SM, and CP. In addition, we will cooperate with district office of agriculture and public works of sub-national level under the facilitation from deputy district governor, but the plan revised some schedule and waiting process due to budget revision. )

Throughout the reporting period, the project staff dedicated their efforts to working with the families of clients who had received small business support. These families expressed a desire to receive training in animal raising, and in response, a plan was devised to include both the training and community education on gender-based violence (GBV), human trafficking (HT), safe migration (SM), and child protection (CP). There are also plans to collaborate with the district office of agriculture and public works at the sub-national level, with guidance from the deputy district governor. However, due to a budget revision, there have been some schedule adjustments and a waiting process is currently underway.
Paraphrase this sentences (I have reviewed the Manaaki Report, kindly request you to response to some comments)
After analyzing the Manaaki Report, I would like to kindly ask for your feedback and response to certain comments made within the report.
